name: feature.cad.agents
description: CAD Modeler agent (ADR 0153 Phase 4). Turns a request into a parametric 3D model rendered in the EXISTING chat artifact workbench as an orthographic projection — composes the AI chat + the feature.cad.nodes pack; no new chat surface. Pure-agent pack.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: CAD Modeler
agents.description: Turns a request into a parametric 3D model (primitive solids) rendered live in the artifact workbench. Uses openwop:feature.cad.nodes.render.
